task_description: Create a unified Pine Script v6 indicator called Phantom Edge that merges trading logic from 5 separate scripts into a single 3-layer system (WHERE/WHEN/HOW) with complete visual map, dashboard, and alerts at indicators/phantom-edge.pine

verification.summary: File created with 847 lines. All structural checks pass: 10 request.security() with barmerge.lookahead_off (and 2 with lookahead_on for PDH/PDL/PWH/PWL), 9 extend.both, 9 input groups, 4 alertcondition() calls, 4 barstate.isconfirmed checks. Semantic review v3 approved with no blocking issues.
